mapper.select: SELECT hi.* FROM heritage_item hi WHERE hi.status = #{status} ORDER BY hi.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO heritage_item (title, cover_image, project_introduction, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{title}, #{coverImage}, #{projectIntroduction}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE heritage_item SET title = #{title}, cover_image = #{coverImage}, project_introduction = #{projectIntroduction}, status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT '郑州' AS city, 25 AS count UNION ALL SELECT '开封' AS city, 18 AS count UNION ALL SELECT '洛阳' AS city, 32 AS count UNION ALL SELECT '平顶山' AS city, 15 AS count UNION ALL SELECT '安阳' AS city, 20 AS count UNION ALL SELECT '鹤壁' AS city, 8 AS count UNION ALL SELECT '新乡' AS city, 16 AS count UNION ALL SELECT '焦作' AS city, 14 AS count UNION ALL SELECT '濮阳' AS city, 12 AS count UNION ALL SELECT '许昌' AS city, 10 AS count UNION ALL SELECT '漯河' AS city, 7 AS count UNION ALL SELECT '三门峡' AS city, 9 AS count UNION ALL SELECT '南阳' AS city, 22 AS count UNION ALL SELECT '商丘' AS city, 13 AS count UNION ALL SELECT '信阳' AS city, 17 AS count UNION ALL SELECT '周口' AS city, 19 AS count UNION ALL SELECT '驻马店' AS city, 11 AS count ORDER BY count DESC
